sampled_assertions.assertion: Three distinct eras — symbolic AI, machine learning, and deep learning
Symbolic AI: programmers write rules using human-readable symbols
AI Winter: funding cut in late 1980s because early promises not met
ML: let the computer figure out the rules itself by studying many examples
Deep learning uses structures loosely inspired by the human brain called ANNs
AlexNet 2012: cut error rate nearly in half
Three factors for AlexNet: more data, more compute (GPUs), better algorithms
Symbolic AI still in use: spreadsheet formulas, tax software, traffic-light controllers, legal contract analysis
Diabetic retinopathy screening in rural clinics where specialists are scarce
Jagged frontier: superhuman on image recognition, fails on common-sense questions
